creator: byrnejb@harte-lyne.ca
text:
OS FreeBSD-12.3p5
Atril-1.26.0_6

A pdf file opened in atril-1.26.0_6 allows search and copying.  However, after the file is rotated clockwise the copy function ceases to work. Search continues to work but found text may not be copied notwithstanding that it is highlighted.

File specification:
  Producer:  GPL Ghostscript 9.54.0
    Format:  PDF-1.7
Paper Size:  US Letter, Portrait (216 × 279 mm)

Steps to reproduce:

Open a pdf file in atril
Rotate the view
Attempt to select text in view

Expected behaviour:
Text is selected and may be copied

Observed behaviour:
Text cannot be selected.
